title: This Is Bad... They Just Shut Down FABLE 5
summary: A YouTube video reports that Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models were shut down by US government order after only three days of public availability. The commentary raises concerns about whether frontier AI systems will remain accessible to the public or become restricted to government control.
writeup: The video reports that Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models were shut down by US government order after three days of public availability. It frames the event as a test of whether frontier AI systems will stay open to the public or shift toward government control. The commentary connects the shutdown to broader questions about safety and regulation of advanced models.
